import pytest
from myapp._internal.auth import hash_password
from myapp._db.connection import get_connection
from myapp.service._utils import format_response
from myapp._cache.backend import RedisBackend

def test_hash_password():
    result = hash_password("mypassword")
    assert result.startswith("$2b$")

def test_get_connection():
    conn = get_connection()
    assert conn is not None
    conn.close()

def test_format_response():
    result = format_response({"status": "ok"}, code=200)
    assert result["code"] == 200

def test_redis_backend():
    backend = RedisBackend(url="redis://localhost:6379")
    backend.set("key", "value")
    assert backend.get("key") == "value"
